title: cyclosorus arenicola
intro: Cyclosorus arenicola, also known as the sandy fern or tropical fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cyclosorus arenicola include its potential to treat fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
